Our Progress

100,000

TOTAL RAISED OF $275,000,000 GOAL

NMH Receives $50 Million Gift from Devoted Alum

Read More

The world is calling us to this moment.

Working together – head, heart, and hand – we can answer.

NMH connects students to their intellect, their compassion, and their talents, readying and calling them to act with humanity and purpose. And the world needs that more than ever.

Why This Place, This Moment

So many schools want what we already have. We’re inclusive not just in who comes here, but in how we learn and work together — head, heart, and hand.

Why This Place, This Moment

For nearly 150 years, our school has shown the world what is possible when doors are opened to an education that empowers students from diverse backgrounds to find the purpose in their potential.

Why This Place, This Moment

Campaign Priorities

“This campaign is perhaps among NMH’s most audacious endeavors ever, as we rely on the same spirit of  faith, love, and vision on which Dwight L. Moody founded our school nearly 150 years ago. We embark on this campaign with enthusiasm and confidence. Now is our moment.” 

- Head of School Brian Hargrove
